title: Nithya Jothe Sathya
desc: A desperate husband seeks assistance of a doctor friend when his wife, an expert in biology, starts to get hallucinations.

title: Snehana Preethina
desc: The rich fathers of Adi and Lakshmi hatch a plot to separate them from their poor respective lovers, Sindhu and Soorya. However, Adi soon realises the truth and decides to set things right.

title: Thayige Thakka Maga
desc: Parvathi, a lawyer, and her son, Mohandas, lead a righteous life. However, they find themselves in danger after crossing path with the son of a corrupt politician.

title: Bhagavanth Kesari
desc: A former prisoner is adamant about training his adoptive daughter to join the Indian Army. However, his mission is interrupted by a conflict with a ruthless businessman.

title: The Villain
desc: Ramu sets out to find his estranged brother, Rama, to reunite him with their mother. However, Ramu soon discovers that Rama is a mafia don, which makes it difficult for Ramu to approach his brother.

title: Head Bush
desc: After taking control over Bangalore, Jayaraj finds himself in a predicament when petty issues trigger within his gang and creates a rift between his friends.
